title: extract a stated figure from a provided report
prompt: Using ONLY the provided document, report the total headcount figure stated for Q4.
Output only the number between <answer> and </answer> tags, nothing else.

documents.title: FY25 operating review
documents.content: The company grew steadily through the year. Hiring accelerated in the second half, and by Q4 the total headcount was 412 employees across three offices. Attrition remained low.
